Casa de Campo Golf & Beach Villa

$3,800,000 · Luxury villa for sale in La Romana

TypeLuxury villa
ListingFor sale
Price$3,800,000
CityLa Romana
Bedrooms5
Bathrooms5
Area780 m²
Lot1800 m²

Grand 5-bedroom villa inside the legendary Casa de Campo resort community. A stunning colonial façade opens to soaring archways, hand-painted tiles, and a large terrace pool overlooking the Teeth of the Dog golf course. Members enjoy access to 18 polo fields, three golf courses, a beach, a marina, and a shooting range.

Features: Golf View, Beach Club Access, Pool, Marina Access, Gated Community, Tennis
